add_to_cart_success.description: Treat add-to-cart as successful when the cart-related UI clearly changes after the CTA click.
signals_any: confirmation text like Added to cart / Добавлено в корзину appears
CTA state changes from add-to-cart to added/in-cart

open_cart_success.description: Treat cart opening as successful when the destination page or visible UI validates as cart.
signals_any: visible text includes cart markers like Корзина, Ваша корзина, Состав заказа, Оформить заказ
